title: Sea-ice charting for safe Arctic and Baltic navigation
summary: Sea-ice products and SAR imagery support safe, efficient navigation in ice-affected waters.
problem: Navigation in northern and Baltic waters is constrained by sea ice that changes rapidly. Outdated or coarse ice information forces conservative routing, icebreaker dependence and higher risk.
solution: CMEMS sea-ice concentration, thickness and drift products, combined with Sentinel-1 SAR imagery that sees through cloud and darkness, provide timely ice charting. This supports safer route selection, icebreaker tasking and reduced transit times.

copernicusRole.detail: CMEMS sea-ice products are combined with Sentinel-1 SAR scenes and navigational judgement for ice charting. Copernicus provides complementary model and image inputs.
